title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・天雷轟くは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After witnessing the phenomenal race between
Tamamo Cross and the other racers up close,
Mejiro Ardan does not falter in the face of their
dazzling light, but feels joy instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes that there are many phenomenal
racers out there to rival her, and that as long as
racing with them pushes her to run with every
ounce of her being, her potential for growth will
remain limitless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This epiphany leaves her unable to contain her
excitement for our next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Around this time, Sakura Chiyono O watches the
autumn Tenno Sho on TV and sees Mejiro Ardan's
growth as a racer with her own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan begins her preparation for the
Osaka Hai. She remains entirely oblivious,
however, to the shadow now cast over Sakura
Chiyono O's face...
